strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and multiple backends
Hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq aligns directly with required AI agent development
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing workshops, and open-source ownership
concerns: Resume shows limited explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience despite being core primary stack
Kotlin experience not evident; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms, ~2016-2018)
Cloud breadth shown mainly via AWS CDK; GCP/Azure and Kubernetes depth not strongly demonstrated
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer well beyond the 6+ year bar, with strong TypeScript/Node/React foundations, demonstrated craftsmanship practices, and directly relevant recent work on AI agents and MCP tooling at re:cinq. Gaps exist around explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and current Kotlin/Java usage, and cloud/Kubernetes breadth is only partially evidenced, but the overall profile maps closely to the role's internal automation tooling focus.
